summary.en: A platform that brings together two or more distinct but interdependent groups of customers. Value is created only when all sides are present, and pricing is typically asymmetric — one side is subsidised so the other side will show up. Search engines, payment networks, marketplaces, app stores, gaming consoles all run this pattern.
summary.zh: 一个把两类或更多类相互依赖的客户群聚到一起的平台 —— 价值只有在各方都到场时才产生,定价通常不对称(给一方补贴以吸引另一方)。搜索引擎、支付网络、交易市场、应用商店、游戏主机都跑的是这个模式。

sources.label: Jean-Charles Rochet & Jean Tirole · 'Platform Competition in Two-Sided Markets' · Journal of the European Economic Association · 2003
Eisenmann, Parker & Van Alstyne · 'Strategies for Two-Sided Markets' · Harvard Business Review · October 2006
Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 (Pattern No. 3, pp. 76-81)

references.label: Jean-Charles Rochet & Jean Tirole · 'Platform Competition in Two-Sided Markets' · Journal of the European Economic Association

note.en: Originating economics paper. Formalises pricing in two-sided markets and the role of cross-side network effects. Tirole later won the 2014 Nobel for related work.
note.zh: 原始经济学论文,正式描述双边市场的定价模型与跨边网络效应。Tirole 后因相关研究获 2014 年诺贝尔经济学奖。

references.label: Thomas Eisenmann, Geoffrey Parker & Marshall Van Alstyne · 'Strategies for Two-Sided Markets' · Harvard Business Review

note.en: Manager-friendly translation of the academic theory. Introduces the 'subsidy side / money side' framing, the chicken-and-egg ignition problem, and platform envelopment risk.
note.zh: 把学术理论翻译给管理者读的一篇。引入了「补贴方 / 收钱方」的视角、先有鸡还是先有蛋的启动困境,以及平台被吞并的风险。

references.label: Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley

note.en: Adapts MSP into the BMC pattern catalog (Pattern No. 3). Featured paradigm cases: Google (3-sided: searchers + advertisers + content sites) and Wii (gamers + game developers).
note.zh: 把多边平台收录为 BMC 模式手册(第 3 号模式)。书中重点案例:Google(三边:用户 + 广告主 + 内容站)与任天堂 Wii(玩家 + 游戏开发者)。
